name: deepbiology-lab
description: Resolve genes, cell lines, and variants and run DeepBiology genomics workflows from Qwen CLI.

settings.name: DeepBiology MCP URL
settings.description: Complete Streamable HTTP endpoint, such as http://localhost:8000/mcp for development or the HTTPS production endpoint.

settings.name: DeepBiology API key
settings.description: API key sent as an Authorization Bearer credential on every MCP request.
